final_prompt.prompt:
Create a banner news/hot-topic editorial photo for Weibo (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a documentary photojournalism aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours, must feel like a premium phone-captured live shot with impact and authenticity
Composition: must be wide horizontal banner with 16:9 aspect ratio, ample negative space for text placement
Subject: must include silhouetted pedestrians in motion (hurried), distant high-rise buildings reflecting sunset
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban skyline at dusk with neon lights beginning to glow, dramatic sunset reflections on skyscrapers, strong sense of real on-site presence
Lighting/mood: needs dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with high contrast between warm sunset and cool neon — exact light source balance is yours
Color palette: needs warm-cool contrast direction (warm sunset tones vs cool neon blues) — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs 8K-quality sharp detail texture treatment — exact grain and sharpness level is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, bold, modern sans-serif, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary, smaller), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 16:9 horizontal aspect ratio; must include ample negative space for text overlay; must feel like authentic Weibo trending post editorial image
Avoid: must avoid overly staged or artificial studio aesthetics; must avoid cluttered composition that compromises text legibility
